title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Metro Cash & Carry

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Metro Cash & Carry
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Metro Cash & Carry in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Metro Cash & Carry:
Metro Cash & Carry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry!
